positive: A minimalist, high-contrast vector illustration of a majestic mountain landscape meeting a stylized, flowing river at sunset. The composition features strong geometric shapes forming the mountain peaks and sweeping, curvilinear lines for the water. Utilize limited, contrasting colors: deep navy, burnt orange, sage green, and crisp cream. The style should emulate modern woodblock printing and clean graphic design, optimized for textile printing. Focus on clean silhouettes, deep blacks, and distinct color blocking. Overhead view, centered composition, perfectly crisp edges, 2D graphic design.
